title: Threshold stability gate
description: Ship the fixed-threshold re-scoring utility + retroactive gate. Future experiments evaluate challenger lead time at the frozen baseline threshold in addition to the per-variant F1-optimal threshold, preventing the B3/C3/B5 class of threshold-shift measurement artifacts.

retroactive_findings.original_verdict: Merged under override — we expect GFC lead to remain strong at the fixed threshold.
DISCARD under per-variant F1 threshold — did re-optimization destroy the lead?
DISCARD — does Dot-com lift hold at the fixed threshold? Does GFC collapse remain?
